fixes.origin:
query = (
    "SELECT id, name, quantity "
    "FROM stock "
    "ORDER BY quantity " + sort_direction

fixes.replacement:
direction = "ASC" if sort_direction.upper() == "ASC" else "DESC"

query = (
    "SELECT id, name, quantity "
    "FROM stock "
    "ORDER BY quantity " + direction
)

cur.execute(query)
